Author: Nainaiowo
Name: Better Deaths
Description: Records party deaths with pull grouping, fatal events, active statuses, and recent action timelines.
Changelog:
Added a private code-side blocklist for users with a history of targeted harassment or abusive behavior.
Recap popup buttons can now be dragged directly to move the popup.
Added a Test recap popup preview so you can place the popup without needing to die.
P4 replay labels now follow the next resolving debuff and can show paired debuffs.
Fatal sequence now starts collapsed.
Cleaned up focused Summary spacing.
